use_cases: Selecting a theme color in application settings
Choosing product color variants in e-commerce interfaces
Picking label or tag colors in project management tools
Customizing accent colors in design or branding tools
Setting user profile or avatar accent colors in social applications
ai_summary: A minimalist color picker component implemented as a radio group with visual color swatches. Each option displays a rounded color dot with a ring indicator on selection and a checkmark icon for feedback. Built with Tailwind CSS using peer-based state styling for clean, accessible color selection in forms and settings interfaces.
